# services.mpdris2-rs

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mpdris2-rs`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable mpdris2-rs, A lightweight implementation of MPD to D-Bus bridge. |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.host` | `null or string` | hostname + port, or UNIX socket path of MPD server, similar to what mpc takes |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.notifications.body` | `null or string` | Templating for the notification body. |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.notifications.bodyPaused` | `null or string` | Templating for the notification body (when paused). |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.notifications.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable song change notifications. |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.notifications.summary` | `null or string` | Templating for the notification summary. |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.notifications.summaryPaused` | `null or string` | Templating for the notification summary (when paused). |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.notifications.timeout` | `null or floating point number` | notification timeout (default 5 secs) |
| `services.mpdris2-rs.package` | `package` | The mpdris2-rs package to use. |
